title: Wang Tian Shan
content:
Wang Tian Shan
 is the Patriarch of the 
Wang Clan
 and father of 
Wang Zhou
.

Book One

2.2

Links and References

Background
[
]

Sometime in the past he and his brothers, excluding 
Fourth Uncle
, schemed against 
Wang Tian Shui
 to successfully steal his portion of their inheritance.

History
[
]

Book One
[
]

He is seen at Wang Tian Shui's home, mocking his brother on how his son, 
Wang Lin
, will fail the Heng You Sect's tests, while also remarking how talented his own Wang Zhou is. Sure enough, Wang Lin does fail and is met with Wang Tian Shan's public mockery and scorn alongside the entire Wang Ckan and their neighbours. When Wang Lin runs away, his brother abd Fourth Uncle force him to reluctantly ask the Heng Yue Sect to look for him.

Book Two
[
]

He is unsurmoniously slaughtered alongside the entire Wang Clan by 
Teng Huayuan
 in an act of revenge against Wang Lin for killing his grandson.
